arts.ttl: Spurs' Kulusevski (foot) likely out until int'l break
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur midfielder Dejan Kulusevski is unlikely to return before the international break at the end of the month, Ange Postecoglou has said.

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs AZ Alkmaar - Europa League
arts.sum: How Tottenham could line up for their Europa League last 16 first leg with AZ Alkmaar on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Daniel Levy has 'A-grade' Tottenham takeover problem as Amanda Staveley and Qataris mull £3.75bn deal
Ange Postecoglou senses opportunity for Tottenham despite star man's injury blow
arts.sum: Spurs are favourites to win the Europa League, a competition they have struggled to make an impression in for years, despite Dejan Kulusevski being ruled out of AZ Alkmaar tie with foot injury

arts.ttl: Postecoglou sees Spurs redemption chance through Europa League glory
arts.sum: ‘The boys really understand there is a great opportunity’ Romero, Van de Ven and Solanke all travel for AZ tie Ange Postecoglou believes Tottenham’s rejuvenated squad can sense an opportunity in the Europa League to make up for their disappointing season but confirmed that Dejan Kulusevski is set to be out until after the international break. The defenders Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven, and their record signing, Dominic Solanke, have all travelled to the Netherlands for the first leg against AZ Alkmaar on Thursday, with the Spurs manager set to make a late call on whether they will feature after extended periods on the sidelines. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou eyes up ‘great opportunity’ to excel in Europa League
arts.sum: The Europa League is Tottenham’s last chance to win silverware this season

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major triple injury boost as Ange Postecoglou reveals Europa League plan
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou reveals plan as Solanke, Van de Ven and Romero near comebacks

arts.ttl: Tottenham handed major boost with THREE first-team players set to return from injury in this week's Europa League clash with AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Tottenham face AZ Alkmaar in the last 16 of a competition they have to win if Postecoglou is to make good on his claim that he never fails to win a trophy in his second season at a club.

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven decision made as £30m man drops out: Tottenham predicted starting XI v AZ
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur will get their Europa League knockout campaign under way on Thursday night when they head to AZ Alkmaar. Spurs will be facing the...

arts.ttl: Injured Kulusevski 'unlikely' to feature for Spurs again until April
arts.sum: Dejan Kulusevski is "unlikely" to feature for Tottenham again until April after suffering a foot injury, says manager Ange Postecoglou.
